hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); echo "$f" | grep -qE '/auto-blog/(src/|Dockerfile|docker-compose)' && (cd /Users/jessica/dev/auto-blog && docker compose up -d --build 2>&1 | tail -3) || true

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); echo "$f" | grep -qE '/auto-blog/(content/|config/)' && (export PATH="/Users/jessica/Library/Python/3.9/bin:$PATH" && cd /Users/jessica/dev/auto-blog && auto-blog build 2>&1 | tail -3) || true
